justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted 'tomorrow' as June 2nd and accurately presented available times for that day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively presented all available options for the requested day, allowing the user to choose without further negotiation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just two turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the request and confirming the appointment.
